title: Phase 7C Proof Bundle — Feedback Loop Closure
gate: Phase 7C must close with proof before Phase 7D starts

prerequisite_merges.title: P7C-01a: Add runtime access to market_family_trust for scoring
P7C-01b: Apply bounded trust adjustments in candidate scoring
P7C-02b: Extend CLV feedback to write through approved path
P7C-03: Runtime proof that recorded tuning is consumed

assertions.claim: Runtime scoring changes when trust/tuning inputs change

evidence.test: candidate-scoring-service.test.ts: 'P7C runtime proof: trust data with sufficient sample adjusts model_score'
evidence.mechanism: Seeds InMemoryMarketFamilyTrustRepository with win_rate=0.65, sample_size=10. Runs scoring twice — once without trust, once with. Asserts trustResult.trustAdjusted === 1 and trust-adjusted score !== base score.
evidence.code_path: candidate-scoring-service.ts:117-122 — reads trustRow, applies bounded adjustment when sample_size >= 5 and win_rate !== null

assertions.claim: The effect is bounded and inspectable

evidence.test: Trust adjustment fires with win_rate=0.65 (15% above breakeven), capped at ±0.05
evidence.inert_test: 'insufficient sample trust data leaves scoring inert' — sample_size=2 below MIN_TRUST_SAMPLE_SIZE=5 produces trustAdjusted=0

assertions.claim: CLV-driven updates propagate to the intended stores

evidence.persistence_path: market-family-trust-repository.ts: insertClvFeedback() writes to market_family_trust with metadata.source='clv-feedback'
evidence.consumer: clv-feedback.ts: computeAndPersistMarketFamilyClvFeedback() aggregates CLV by market, writes through insertClvFeedback()
evidence.append_only: Existing tuning-run rows are never mutated. CLV feedback rows are insert-only with distinct metadata.source='clv-feedback'

assertions.claim: Recorded tuning is demonstrably read by runtime

evidence.runtime_path: candidate-scoring-service.ts:169-183 — loadTrustMap() calls repos.marketFamilyTrust.listLatestRun(), builds Map<market_type_id, MarketFamilyTrustRow>
evidence.scoring_consumption: candidate-scoring-service.ts:117 — trustRow looked up by universe.market_type_id
evidence.test: 'P7C runtime proof: trust data with sufficient sample adjusts model_score' — proves listLatestRun() is called, rows are matched, and adjustment is applied
evidence.wiring: index.ts passes runtime.repositories.marketFamilyTrust to scoring deps; RepositoryBundle.marketFamilyTrust is a required field

assertions.claim: No unsupported attribution claim is used as justification

evidence.adjustment_source: Trust adjustment is purely mechanical: (win_rate - 0.5) * 0.1, capped at ±0.05. No causal attribution claimed.
evidence.no_attribution_references: grep 'attribution' candidate-scoring-service.ts returns 0 matches in scoring logic
evidence.bounded_signal: The adjustment is a bounded bias correction from historical win rate, not a predictive model or causal claim

phase_7c_gate_verdict: PASS — all 5 assertions hold. Phase 7C feedback loop closure is complete.
